obj.html_content:
Hinvhingbrooke Country Park


The Park
Area: hectares
Habitats: wetland, grassland and woodland
Wetland: lakes, ponds and a
Wildlife includes birds, insects and animals
Subjects studied in educational visits include
Science: Children look at about plants, etc.
Geography: includes learning to use a and compass History: changes in land use
Leisure and tourism: mostly concentrates on the park's
Music: Children make with natural materials, and experiment with rhythm and speed.

Benefits of outdoor educational visits
They give children a feeling of that they may not have elsewhere.
Children learn new and gain self-confidence.
Practical issues
Cost per child: £
Adults, such as , free

added_content.ex_information:
Complete the notes below.
Write
ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER
for each answer.

sentence.content: Sally:Good morning. Hinchingbrooke Country Park, Sally speaking. I’m one of the rangers.
sentence.content_zh: 莎莉：早上好。我是欣钦布鲁克郊野公园的莎莉。我是护林员之一。

sentence.content: John:Oh hello. My name’s John Chapman, and I’m a teaching assistant at a local primary school.I’ve been asked to arrange a visit to the park for two of our classes.
sentence.content_zh: 约翰：哦，你好。我叫约翰·查普曼，是当地一所小学的助教。我被要求为我们两个班的学生安排一次参观公园的活动。

sentence.content: Sally: OK. What would you like to know?
sentence.content_zh: 莎莉：好的，你想知道什么？

sentence.content: John: Well, I’m new to this area, so perhaps you could tell me something about the park first, please
sentence.content_zh: 约翰：嗯，我刚到这个地方，也许你可以先告诉我一些公园的情况。

sentence.content: Sally: Of course. Altogether the park covers 170 acres, that’s 69 hectares.
sentence.content_zh: 莎莉：当然可以。公园总共占地170英亩，即69公顷。

sentence.content: Sally: There are three main types of habitat: wetland, grassland and woodland.
sentence.content_zh: 莎莉：这里主要有三种栖息地：湿地、草地和林地。

sentence.content: Sally: The woods are well established and varied, with an oak plantation, and other areas of mixed species.
sentence.content_zh: 莎莉：林地植被良好，种类繁多，有橡树种植园和其他混合物种区。

sentence.content: John: Right.
sentence.content_zh: 约翰：好的。

sentence.content: Sally: The wetland is quite varied, too. The original farmland was dug up around 40 years ago to extract gravel.
sentence.content_zh: 莎莉：湿地也很多样。大约 40 年前，为了开采砾石，原来的农田被挖开了。

sentence.content: Sally: Once this work was completed, the gravel pits filled with water, forming the two large lakes.
sentence.content_zh: 莎莉：工程结束后，砾石坑里积满了水，形成了两个大湖。

sentence.content: Sally: There are also several smaller ones, ponds and a stream that flows through the park.
sentence.content_zh: 莎莉：还有几个小湖、池塘和一条流经公园的小溪。

sentence.content: John: OK, so I suppose with these different habitats there’s quite a variety of wildlife.
sentence.content_zh: 约翰：好的，我想有了这些不同的栖息地，野生动物的种类也就相当丰富了。

sentence.content: Sally: There certainly is – a lot of different species of birds and insects, and also animals like deer and rabbits.
sentence.content_zh: 莎莉：当然有，有很多不同种类的鸟类和昆虫，还有鹿和兔子等动物。

sentence.content: John: And I understand you organise educational visits for school parties.
sentence.content_zh: 约翰：我知道你们还为学校组织教育参观。

sentence.content: Sally: That’s right. We can organise a wide range of activities and adapt them to suit all ages.
sentence.content_zh: 莎莉：是的。我们可以组织各种各样的活动，并根据不同年龄段的需要进行调整。

sentence.content: John: Can you give me some examples of the activities?
sentence.content_zh: 约翰：能举几个活动的例子吗？

sentence.content: Sally: Well, one focus is on science, where we help children to discover and study plants, trees and insects.
sentence.content_zh: 莎莉：嗯，其中一个重点是科学，我们帮助孩子们发现和研究植物、树木和昆虫。

sentence.content: Sally: They also collect and analyse data about the things they see.
sentence.content_zh: 莎莉：他们还收集和分析他们所看到的事物的数据。

sentence.content: John: Uhuh.
sentence.content_zh: 约翰：嗯。

sentence.content: Sally: Another focus is on geography. The park is a great environment to learn and practise reading a map and using a compass to navigate around the park.
sentence.content_zh: 莎莉：另一个重点是地理。公园是学习和练习阅读地图和使用指南针在公园内导航的绝佳环境。

sentence.content: John: Do you do anything connected with history?
sentence.content_zh: 约翰：你们有没有开展与历史有关的活动？

sentence.content: Sally: Yes, we do. For instance, the children can explore how the use of the land has changed over time. Then there’s leisure and tourism.
sentence.content_zh: 莎莉：是的，我们有。例如，孩子们可以探索土地的使用随着时间的推移发生了哪些变化。还有休闲和旅游。

sentence.content: John: That focuses on your visitors, I would imagine.
sentence.content_zh: 约翰：我想这主要是针对游客吧。

sentence.content: Sally: Yes, mostly. The children find out about them, their requirements, the problems they may cause and how we manage these.
sentence.content_zh: 莎莉：是的，主要是这样。孩子们可以了解游客、游客的要求、游客可能造成的问题以及我们如何管理这些问题。

sentence.content: Sally: And another subject we cover is music: here the children experiment with natural materials to create sounds and explore rhythm and tempo.
sentence.content_zh: 莎莉：我们涉及的另一个主题是音乐：在这里，孩子们尝试用天然材料创造声音，探索节奏和节拍。

sentence.content: John: That must be fun!
sentence.content_zh: 约翰：那一定很有趣！

sentence.content: Sally: Most children really enjoy it.
sentence.content_zh: 莎莉：大多数孩子都非常喜欢。

sentence.content: Sally: And of course, all the activities are educational, too. Learning outside the classroom encourages children to be creative, and to explore and discover for themselves.
sentence.content_zh: 莎莉：当然，所有活动也都很有教育意义。课外学习鼓励孩子们发挥创造力，自己去探索和发现。

sentence.content: John: I would imagine they get a sense of freedom that might not be a normal part of their lives.
sentence.content_zh: 约翰：我想他们会获得一种自由感，而这种自由感可能不是他们日常生活的一部分。

sentence.content: Sally: That’s right. And very often the children discover that they can do things they didn’t know they could do, and they develop new skills. This gives them greater self-confidence.
sentence.content_zh: 莎莉：没错。很多时候，孩子们会发现自己可以做一些本不知道自己可以做到的事情，他们还培养了新的技能，这让他们更有自信心。

sentence.content: John: It sounds great. So, what about the practical side of it? How much does it cost for a full-day visit? We would expect to bring between 30 and 40 children.
sentence.content_zh: 约翰：听起来不错。那么，实际一点的方面呢？全天参观的费用是多少？我们预计要带 30 到 40 个孩子来这边。

sentence.content: Sally: If there are over 30, it costs ￡4.95 for each child who attends on the day. We invoice you afterwards, so you don’t pay for children who can’t come because of sickness, for example.
sentence.content_zh: 莎莉：如果超过 30 人，当天每个到场孩子的费用为 4.95 英镑。之后我们会向您开具发票，这样您就不用为因生病等原因不能前来的孩子支付费用。

sentence.content: Sally: There’s no charge for leaders and other adults – as many as you want to bring.
sentence.content_zh: 莎莉：领队和其他成人不收费，您想带多少人就带多少人。

sentence.content: John: That sounds very fair. Well, thanks for all the information. I’ll need to discuss it with my colleagues, and I hope to get back to you soon to make a booking.
sentence.content_zh: 约翰：听起来很公平。好的，谢谢您提供的信息。我需要同我的同事商讨一下，希望能尽快与您联系以便预订。

sentence.content: Sally: We’ll look forward to hearing from you. Goodbye
sentence.content_zh: 莎莉：我们期待您的回音。再见。

sentence.content: John: Goodbye, and thank you.
sentence.content_zh: 约翰：再见，谢谢。

officialExplain.explain: 考生需熟悉hectare为面积单位，所以此处要听取数字信息。原文首先出现了干扰项170 acres，随后出现正确答案信息69 hectares。
本题需填入和lakes、ponds并列的单数可数名词。lakes和ponds在录音原文中相隔稍远，但均为原词重现。ponds后出现答案stream，此处也有明显的重读和停顿。考生需熟悉stream的词义和拼写。
题干中的science和plants均原词重现。录音中下一句出现analyse，替换题干中的look at，随后出现答案data。需注意这里look at的意思是“研究”，不能单纯理解为“看”，这一释义在听力题目中较为常见。
本题需听取和compass并列的单数名词，且答案有可能先于compass出现。geography原词重现，use替换为reading，随后出现答案map。并列词and后出现compass，可用于验证答案。
题干中的leisure and tourism原词重现。concentrates on替换为focuses on，随后出现答案visitors。需注意填入名词复数。
题干中的music可定位该题，natural materials原词重现，make替换为create，答案sounds不难得出。
根据题干中的a feeling of可知要填入描述感受的名词。原文中的sense为feeling的常见同义替换，随后出现答案freedom。后文的定语从句that might not be a normal part of their lives对应题干的定语从句that they may not have elsewhere，也可帮助验证答案。
根据题干可知需听取和gain self-confidence并列的内容，并且答案很有可能在关键词前出现。题干词learn替换为develop，new原词重现，答案词skills需注意填入复数形式。录音下一句中出现self-confidence，可辅助验证答案。
原文仅出现一处价格信息，填入此处数字即可。注意前一句说的over 30指人数，而非价格。
题干词free在录音中替换为no charge；A such as B的举例结构替换为B and other A，为填空题常见的替换形式，不难得出答案为leaders。
